auth.forgotPassword.title: Forgot password?
auth.forgotPassword.description: Enter your account email and we'll send a link to set a new password.
auth.forgotPassword.fields.email.label: Email
auth.forgotPassword.sent.title: Check your inbox
auth.forgotPassword.sent.descriptionSuff: we've sent a reset link. It may take a minute; check spam if you don't see it.
auth.resetPassword.title: Set new password
auth.resetPassword.description.missingTo: Use the link from your email to set a new password. If you landed here by mistake, request a new link from the sign-in page.
auth.resetPassword.done.title: Password updated
auth.resetPassword.errors.generic: Something went wrong. Try again or request a new link.
authCta.default.description: Sign in to explore production SaaS codebases, save the recipes worth revisiting, and turn proven implementation patterns into your next release.
authCta.default.items.library.title: Browse vetted codebases
authCta.default.items.library.descriptio: Study real repositories with architecture, tooling, and product context in one place.
authCta.default.items.guidance.title: Borrow proven guidance
authCta.default.items.guidance.descripti: See how teams structure features, ship faster, and avoid rebuilding the same decisions from scratch.
authCta.default.items.patterns.title: Save patterns you trust
authCta.default.items.patterns.descripti: Keep the stacks, ideas, and implementation details you want ready for your next build.
authCta.default.footer.title: Why builders use SaaS Recipes
authCta.default.footer.copy: Move from inspiration to implementation with a library of real-world product patterns, not just abstract tutorials.
authCta.forgot.description: We will help you get back into your workspace quickly while keeping your account recovery flow safe and straightforward.
authCta.forgot.items.emailRecovery.title: Email-based recovery
authCta.forgot.items.emailRecovery.descr: Request a reset link from the address tied to your account and continue from any device.
authCta.forgot.items.quickTurnaround.des: Most reset emails arrive within minutes so you can get back to building without a long detour.
authCta.forgot.items.saferReset.title: Safer reset flow
authCta.forgot.items.saferReset.descript: Reset links expire and are designed to protect access while you restore your sign-in details.
authCta.forgot.footer.title: Need a hand?
authCta.forgot.footer.copy: Use the email connected to your account for the smoothest recovery experience.
authCta.reset.description: Choose a fresh password so you can get back to exploring codebases, comparing stacks, and saving the patterns you want to reuse.
authCta.reset.items.uniquePassword.title: Use a unique password
authCta.reset.items.uniquePassword.descr: Pick something new that you do not reuse across other services or shared team accounts.
authCta.reset.items.protectLogins.title: Protect future sign-ins
authCta.reset.items.protectLogins.descri: A strong password lowers the risk of account reuse and helps keep your saved recipes private.
authCta.reset.items.continueQuickly.desc: Once updated, you can head straight back to sign in and continue where you left off.
authCta.reset.footer.title: Almost there
authCta.reset.footer.copy: Create a password you can remember securely, then sign back in and keep building.
authLayoutFooter.welcomeDescription: Sign in to securely compare stacks, save recipes, and ship with confidence.
cta.description: Explore real codebases, copy battle-tested architecture decisions, and skip weeks of trial and error. Open the app and get cooking.
cta.heading: Ready to cook?
features.header.description: Built for solo developers, student projects, startups, and growing product teams. Learn from real shipped codebases and launch with fewer blind spots.
features.items.analysis.title: Deep repo analysis
features.items.analysis.description: Break down real SaaS codebases into the modules, architecture choices, and hotspots that matter before you copy a pattern.
features.items.recipes.title: Reusable build recipes
features.items.recipes.description: Turn real implementation details into practical recipes you can borrow for product workflows, stack choices, and delivery tradeoffs.
features.items.security.title: Security-aware patterns
features.items.security.description: Spot how production teams handle auth, billing, and other sensitive product surfaces before you ship your own version.
features.items.momentum.title: Momentum signals
features.items.momentum.description: See which repositories are actively improving, where the energy is going, and whether a product pattern still looks worth adopting.
features.items.surface.title: Discover the right surface area
features.items.surface.description: Filter by stack, product category, and launch shape so you can find examples that actually match what you are building.
features.items.typesafe.title: Type-safe implementation clues
features.items.typesafe.description: Understand how mature teams wire contracts, typed systems, and safer integrations across the parts of the product that matter most.
hero.description.primary: Eat the boilerplate. A platform of proven cookbooks from real kitchens ― plus an AI assistant built from experience.
hero.description.secondary: Secret sauce: proven patterns from teams that ship.
howItWorks.description: The recipes are a curated intelligence layer for learning from real products and applying those lessons to your own.
howItWorks.heading: How teams ship faster with saas.recipes
howItWorks.items.patterns.title: Study proven product patterns
howItWorks.items.patterns.description: Inspect how real teams structure architecture, organize repos, and connect product decisions to implementation details.
howItWorks.items.patterns.highlights.arc: Review architecture patterns from shipped repositories
howItWorks.items.patterns.highlights.org: See how teams organize code for long-term scale
howItWorks.items.insights.title: Filter for relevant insights
howItWorks.items.insights.description: Compare the examples that actually match your stack, stage, and product shape instead of copying generic advice.
howItWorks.items.insights.highlights.fil: Filter by stack, workflow, and product category
howItWorks.items.insights.highlights.tra: Understand tradeoffs before you adopt a pattern
howItWorks.items.launch.title: Launch with more confidence
howItWorks.items.launch.description: Reuse real implementation signals so you can skip avoidable boilerplate and move from idea to release faster.
howItWorks.items.launch.highlights.confi: Ship with context from products that already work
landingFooter.description: Discover battle-tested open source SaaS projects, compare their stacks, workflows, and AI setup. Ship faster with implementation patterns you can trust.
landingFooter.eyebrow: View profitable SaaS setups in seconds
landingFooter.heading: Sign up fast, explore trusted SaaS recipes, and move your idea from the kitchen to a served product with less friction.
theme.label: Theme
themeCustomizer.description: Customize the theme and layout of your dashboard.
themeCustomizer.title: Customizer
testimonials.description: Solo developers and product teams use SaaS Recipes to launch faster and avoid reinventing the wheel.
testimonials.heading: Built for All Kitchens
testimonials.items.first.quote: SaaS Recipes helped me skip weeks of repo spelunking. I found patterns I could trust and shipped my first version much faster.
testimonials.items.first.author: Indie founder
testimonials.items.second.quote: It feels like having a curated library of real implementation playbooks instead of guessing how production teams actually build things.
testimonials.items.second.author: Product engineer
